title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets are up to date and smart Charge Chase/Stand is out of date
scenario: After completing a language change DFU on a multi-component device, the Smart Charge Case/Stand shows as out of date while the Earbuds/Headset show as up to date.
steps: 1. Have a device with multiple components (Earbuds/Headset and Smart Charge Case/Stand) that is not on the latest firmware.
2. Initiate a language change DFU (Device Firmware Update) on the device.
3. Allow the DFU process to complete successfully.
4. After completion, check the firmware status of the Earbuds/Headsets.
5. Check the firmware status of the Smart Charge Case/Stand.
expected: All components (Earbuds/Headsets and Smart Charge Case/Stand) should be updated to the latest firmware version after the language change DFU completes successfully.
keywords: Smart Charge Case/Stand out of date
